2320510.name: Dynasties Through the Aeons
2320510.description:
Dynasties through the Aeons is a Massive Multiplayer Grand Strategy game where you step into the shoes of a noble House as part of one of history's greatest Empires.

As the head of your House, you must provide for the needs of your population, manage your resources, territories & armies and make alliances all in an effort to become the world's most powerful House.

Beware though, as rival Houses from within your empire and beyond will antagonize you, as they're all vying for control in a world of political intrigue and warfare.

Dynasties through the Aeons is the ultimate Grand Strategy experience for those who seek to conquer and dominate the world in a Massive Multiplayer Environment.
